prestazioni: Supercharged 5.0L AJ-V8 Gen III (engine code: AJ133S) upgraded with a Harrop HTV2300 TVS supercharger (12psi boost, 700+ HP) paired with a custom heat exchanger from CSF Racing (part #8020) and a methanol injection kit from Snow Performance (Stage 3, dual-nozzle setup for intercooler spray)

Full titanium exhaust system by Milltek Sport (cat-back, 3.5" mandrel-bent tubing, non-resonated center section) with custom X-pipe and secondary cats delete (replaced with GESI 200-cell metallic core race cats for emissions compliance)

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV dampers, 8-position rebound, 20-way compression adjust) with custom spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) and spherical bearing top mounts from SuperPro (part #SPF6005K) for subframe reinforcement
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (FRP construction, 50mm extended fenders, custom carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser with Gurney flap)
Custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon (vented, OEM-style latches, weight reduction of 12kg) with a functional NACA duct feeding the Harrop supercharger intercooler

BBS FI-R wheels (20x9.5 +25 front, 20x11 +35 rear) in gloss black with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 305/30/20 rear) and paired with AP Racing CP9460-1000 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with custom two-piece rotors (380mm front, 365mm rear)
